subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast striven with thy spirit, thy being and thine essence to diffuse the fragrances of God! Well done! Well done! for thou hast stood firm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اجتهد بروحه و ذاته و کینونته فی نشر نفحات الله احسنت احسنت بما استقمت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
